queries.question: Can you show me the description of each assignment along with its deadline?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description ?year ?month ?day WHERE {
  ?a a :Assignments .
  ?d a :Date .
  ?a p:hasDate ?d .
  ?a p:description ?description .
  ?d p:year ?year .
  ?d p:month ?month .
  ?d p:day ?day .
}

queries.question: Can you show me the description of each assignment along with its deadline?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description ?hour ?minute ?second WHERE {
  ?a a :Assignments .
  ?d a :Time .
  ?a p:hasTime ?d .
  ?a p:description ?description .
  ?d p:hour ?hour .
  ?d p:minute ?minute .
  ?d p:second ?second .
}

queries.question: Can you show me the description of each assignment along with its deadline?
queries.sql:
SELECT a.Description, d.Year, d.Month, d.Day,  t.hour, t.minute, t.second
FROM Assignments a
JOIN Date d ON a.Due_Date = d.Date_ID
JOIN Time t ON a.Due_time = t.time_ID;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description ?year ?month ?day ?hour ?minute ?second WHERE {
  ?a a :Assignments .
  ?d a :Date .
  ?a p:hasDate ?d .
  ?t a :Time .
  ?a p:hasTime ?t .
  ?a p:description ?description .
  ?d p:year ?year .
  ?d p:month ?month .
  ?d p:day ?day .
  ?t p:hour ?hour .
  ?t p:minute ?minute .
  ?t p:second ?second .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Can you show me the description of each assignment along with its deadline?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?description ?year ?month ?day WHERE {
  ?a a :Assignments .
  ?d a :Date .
  ?a p:hasDate ?d .
  ?a p:description ?description .
  ?d p:year ?year .
  ?d p:month ?month .
  ?d p:day ?day .
} }
  full: { SELECT ?description ?year ?month ?day ?hour ?minute ?second WHERE {
  ?a a :Assignments .
  ?d a :Date .
  ?a p:hasDate ?d .
  ?t a :Time .
  ?a p:hasTime ?t .
  ?a p:description ?description .
  ?d p:year ?year .
  ?d p:month ?month .
  ?d p:day ?day .
  ?t p:hour ?hour .
  ?t p:minute ?minute .
  ?t p:second ?second .
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?description ?hour ?minute ?second WHERE {
  ?a a :Assignments .
  ?d a :Time .
  ?a p:hasTime ?d .
  ?a p:description ?description .
  ?d p:hour ?hour .
  ?d p:minute ?minute .
  ?d p:second ?second .
} }
}
